title: The big AI test is ahead of us.
section_path: The big AI test is ahead of us.
section_path_text: The big AI test is ahead of us.
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know about this week
Markets have shifted their attention from Hormuz to AI Mega IPOs. By the end of the year, investors and businesses will have a lot more visibility on the workings of the world's biggest AI companies. This is as much an opportunity as it is a risk.
